CustomField.description: Formula field to convert the time of Expiry_Date_time__c to GMT if running User is in BST and display expiry time as 23:59:59.
CustomField.formula: RIGHT("00"& TEXT(DAY(DATEVALUE( Expiry_Date_time__c ))), 2) & "/" & RIGHT("00" & TEXT(MONTH(DATEVALUE( Expiry_Date_time__c ))), 2) & "/" & TEXT(YEAR(DATEVALUE( Expiry_Date_time__c ))) & " 23:59"
CustomField.label: Expiry Date/Time Formula
